case_title: SF HOUSING AUTHORITY vs. SMITH, REGINALD et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, REGINALD WATKINS, SIBYL

THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. JUDGMENT IS ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF, SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AND AGAINST DEFENDANTS, REGINALD SMITH AND SIBYL WATKINS FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE DWELLING UNIT LOCATED AT 1250 EDDY STREET, APT. 443, SAN FRANCISCO AND FOR THE SUM OF $2,364.00 FOR BACK RENT THROUGH MAY 30, 1995. A WRIT OF POSSESSION SHALL BE ISSUED AND POSTED IMMEDIATELY. ACTUAL EVICTION SHALL BE STAYED THROUGH 6-12-95, 12 NOON. DEFENDANTS STATE THERE ARE NO OTHER ADULT OCCUPANTS OF THIS UNIT OTHER THAN THEMSELVES. DEFENDANTS WILL NOT BE ENTITLED TO ANY OTHER STAYS OF EXECUTION. DEFENDANTS WAIVE THE RIGHT TO THE RETURN OF THEIR SECURITY DEPOSIT. ONCE DEFENDANTS HAVE VACATED THIS UNIT, PLAINTIFF WILL AGREE TO SIGN A STIPULATION TO VACATE THIS JUDGMENT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SMITH, REGINALD WATKINS, SIBYL
